_publications._publicationTitle: Small Extracellular Vesicles Derived from NF2-Associated Schwannoma Cells Modulate Tumor Progression and Immunity via HSP90.

_contextSnippet: CD14+ monocytes exposed to NF2-EVs for 24 h displayed a marked downregulation of HLA-DR expression
details: Successfully detected marked downregulation of HLA-DR expression in CD14+ monocytes exposed to NF2-EVs for 24 h
